items.title_en: U.S. senators ban themselves from prediction markets trading
items.title_zh: 美国参议员禁止自己参与预测市场交易
items.desc_en: The move came after Democratic lawmakers asked the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to prohibits event contracts on elections, war and military actions.
items.desc_zh: 此前，民主党议员要求商品期货交易委员会禁止有关选举、战争和军事行动的事件合同。

items.title_en: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
items.title_zh: Twitch 主播被车撞到镜头前直播 - “感觉就像慢动作”
items.desc_en: Isaiah Thomas, known as hmblzayy, was walking a 3,000-mile challenge when he was hit
items.desc_zh: 以赛亚·托马斯（Isaiah Thomas，又名 hmblzayy）在进行 3,000 英里挑战时被击中

items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：Blue Owl、高通、赫兹、礼来公司、Meta Platforms、微软等

items.desc_zh: 以下是午盘交易中成为头条新闻的股票。

items.title_zh: 特朗普撤回凯西·米恩斯博士的卫生局局长提名，并宣布继任者 - NBC新闻

items.desc_zh: 特朗普撤回了凯西·米恩斯 (Casey Means) 博士的卫生局局长提名，并宣布继任者 NBC 新闻特朗普撤回了他的卫生局局长人选，并对该职位进行了第三次提名 CNN 特朗普放弃了陷入困境的激增

items.title_en: Pricey NFL, NBA ownership stakes are pushing investors to smaller leagues and driving valuations higher
items.title_zh: 昂贵的 NFL 和 NBA 所有权股份正将投资者推向规模较小的联盟，并推高估值
items.desc_en: Priced out of the NBA and NFL, investors are asking bankers about opportunities to buy minority stakes in teams with lower valuations.
items.desc_zh: 由于 NBA 和 NFL 的定价过高，投资者正在向银行家询问是否有机会购买估值较低的球队的少数股权。

items.title_en: Palantir is a stock in peril. Look at these chart support levels before any major washout
items.title_zh: Palantir 是一只处于危险之中的股票。在出现任何重大下跌之前查看这些图表支撑位
items.desc_en: Despite a recent minor bullish divergence, momentum remains broadly weak. This reinforces a broken primary trend.
items.desc_zh: 尽管最近出现了小幅看涨背离，但动能仍然普遍疲弱。这强化了破碎的主要趋势。

items.title_en: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.title_zh: 缅甸前领导人昂山素季转为软禁，军方称
items.desc_en: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
items.desc_zh: 这位诺贝尔和平奖获得者自 2021 年在军事政变中被赶下台以来一直被拘留。

items.title_en: Blue Owl shares surge after private credit firm cites 10X gains from SpaceX loan
items.title_zh: 私人信贷公司称 SpaceX 贷款带来 10 倍收益后 Blue Owl 股价飙升
items.desc_en: Blue Owl said it's made 10 times its investment in SpaceX, which is headed for a record IPO later this year.
items.desc_zh: Blue Owl 表示，其对 SpaceX 的投资是其 10 倍，该公司将于今年晚些时候进行创纪录的 IPO。

items.title_en: What to Know About the Stabbing Attack Against 2 Jewish Men in London - The New York Times
items.title_zh: 关于伦敦两名犹太男子被刺伤的事件，你该知道些什么 - 纽约时报中文网

items.title_en: Trump expected to sign executive order expanding retirement account access for workers

items.desc_zh: 总统的行政命令将扩大工人退休账户的使用范围，并将与储蓄者匹配计划相结合。

items.title_en: House strips MAHA-hated pesticide provisions from farm bill
items.title_zh: 众议院从农业法案中删除了 MAHA 讨厌的农药条款
items.desc_en: MAHA advocates said the language that was stripped could have provided liability protection for Bayer in lawsuits involving its Roundup weedkiller.
items.desc_zh: MAHA 的支持者表示，被删除的语言本可以在涉及拜耳农达除草剂的诉讼中为拜耳提供责任保护。

items.title_en: Google cloud growth tops Microsoft and Amazon as all three beat estimates on AI demand
items.title_zh: 谷歌云增长超过微软和亚马逊，这三者都超出了人工智能需求的预期

items.title_en: Man sentenced to death for murder of toddlers at Ugandan nursery
items.title_zh: 男子因在乌干达托儿所谋杀幼儿而被判处死刑
items.desc_en: Christopher Okello Onyum had pleaded insanity but this was dismissed by the judge.
items.desc_zh: 克里斯托弗·奥凯洛·奥纽姆 (Christopher Okello Onyum) 辩称精神错乱，但被法官驳回。

items.title_en: California gas prices hit $6 per gallon as fuel costs jump nearly 30 cents in a week across the U.S.
items.title_zh: 由于全美燃料成本一周内上涨近 30 美分，加州天然气价格触及每加仑 6 美元。
items.desc_en: Fuel costs are rising after it gas became clear that Iran is not reopening the Strait of Hormuz, one of the most important oil export corridors in the world.
items.desc_zh: 在伊朗明确表示不会重新开放世界上最重要的石油出口走廊之一的霍尔木兹海峡后，燃料成本正在上涨。

items.desc_zh: 这名五岁女孩最后一次出现是在周六，地点是爱丽丝泉附近的一个原住民城镇营地。

items.desc_zh: 无人机用户还需要在飞行前注册其设备并获得许可。

items.title_en: Christchurch mass killer loses bid to overturn conviction
items.title_zh: 基督城大屠杀凶手推翻定罪的努力失败
items.desc_en: White supremacist Brenton Tarrant's appeal is "utterly devoid of merit", a New Zealand court has ruled.
items.desc_zh: 新西兰法院裁定，白人至上主义者布伦顿·塔兰特的上诉“完全没有依据”。

items.title_zh: 默茨批评战争后，特朗普表示美国正在研究削减驻德部队
items.desc_en: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 在他发表上述言论之前，德国总理批评了美国对伊朗战争的态度。

items.title_zh: 邦迪枪击事件皇家委员会表示应优先考虑枪支改革

items.desc_zh: 一份临时报告还表示，犹太节日的治安安排应扩大到其他“高风险”活动。

items.title_en: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
items.title_zh: 检察官指控美国歌手 D4vd 在网上购买工具处理女孩尸体
items.desc_en: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.
items.desc_zh: 这位抖音明星的律师坚称他无罪，并誓言“大力捍卫”他。

items.title_en: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel

items.desc_en: The governor of Sinaloa, Rúben Rocha Moya, hails from the same party as the president of Mexico.
items.desc_zh: 锡那罗亚州州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚与墨西哥总统来自同一党派。

items.title_en: 'I did not expect it': Kenya's Sabastian Sawe welcomed home with jubilant celebrations

items.desc_en: The first man to run a marathon in under two hours in a competitive race received a hero's welcome from supporters and family when he arrived home.
items.desc_zh: 第一个在竞技比赛中在两小时内跑完马拉松的人回到家时受到了支持者和家人英雄般的欢迎。
